features.name: Career Center
features.description: Home tab. Shows your goal, Smart/Grit/Build scores, track playbook, resume/Voice prompt, Jobs/New audit/Achievements buttons, deadlines link, recruiter profile link, and sometimes a This week nudge (deadline/milestone).
features.when: When user asks about home, dashboard, or where to start.

features.name: Primary goal
features.description: Editable field at top of Career Center. Set or edit your career goal (e.g. PM Internships Summer 2025).
features.when: When user asks where to set or change their goal.

features.name: Edit Portfolio
features.description: Pencil icon on Career Center opens edit panel: profile photo, name, major(s), minor(s), track, job locations, tagline, bio, Dilly avatar.
features.when: When user asks to change name, photo, major, or profile info.

features.name: Your numbers / scores
features.description: Smart, Grit, Build scores and overall from your latest audit. Top X% when peer percentiles exist.
features.when: When user asks where to see their scores or what their scores are.

features.name: Top recommendations
features.description: Prioritized actions from your audit still appear in other surfaces (e.g. activity feed, Hiring). Full list: Resume Review / full report.
features.when: When user asks what to do next or where to see recommendations.

features.name: Tech playbook
features.description: Track-specific playbook (headline + bullets). View Full Playbook opens Resume Review.
features.when: When user asks about playbook or track advice.

features.name: Jobs
features.description: Standalone Jobs page (link from Career Center or /jobs). Meridian-verified jobs filtered by resume and location. Bookmark, collections, Why am I a fit, Ask Dilly.
features.when: When user asks about jobs, internships, or what to apply to.

features.name: Recruiter profile / Six-second profile
features.description: Shareable link /p/[slug]. One link recruiters scan in 6 seconds. Copy from Career Center. Updates when you edit profile or run new audit.
features.when: When user asks about recruiter link, share link, or adding Meridian to resume.

features.name: Achievement collection (stickers)
features.description: Achievements page (link from Career Center or Settings). 15 achievements/stickers. Unlock by audits, scores, applications, ATS, streak, etc. Pick 3 for share cards.
features.when: When user asks about stickers, achievements, badges, or what they can unlock.

features.name: Resume Review
features.description: Upload PDF/DOCX to run an audit. After audit: radar chart, findings, red flags, recommendations, share card, Download Badge, Share to LinkedIn, PDF report. New audit FAB.
features.when: When user asks to run a resume check, audit, or see full report.

features.name: View Report
features.description: Same as Resume Review when you already have an audit. Shows full breakdown, findings, recommendations.
features.when: When user asks where to see their full report or audit breakdown.

features.name: New audit
features.description: Button on Career Center or FAB on Resume Review. Clears current audit and starts upload flow to run a fresh resume check.
features.when: When user asks to run a new audit or re-scan resume.

features.name: Insights
features.description: Progress, score trajectory, Progress to Next Tier, Meridian's take, Top X%, milestones, Before & after, playbook, line chart. Career tools: Am I Ready, ATS keyword check, Interview Prep, Gap Analysis, Cover Letter.
features.when: When user asks about progress, milestones, or career tools.

features.name: Am I Ready?
features.description: Job-fit check for a company or role. Enter target; get verdict and gaps. Uses ready check.
features.when: When user asks if they're ready for X company or role.

features.name: ATS Readiness
features.description: Full ATS analysis after an audit. Score 0-100, what ATS sees, checklist, issues, keywords. Overview, What ATS Sees, Checklist, Issues, Keywords tabs.
features.when: When user asks about ATS score, keyword placement, or if resume is ATS-friendly.

features.name: ATS keyword check
features.description: Paste a job description; see missing keywords and suggestions. Part of career tools in Insights.
features.when: When user asks about matching a job description or missing keywords.

features.name: Interview Prep
features.description: Generate practice questions from resume. Also available in Voice (ask for interview prep).
features.when: When user asks for interview questions or prep.

features.name: Gap Analysis
features.description: Gap scan: what's missing for your target. Also in Voice (ask for a gap scan).
features.when: When user asks what's missing or what to improve for their goal.

features.name: Cover Letter
features.description: Cover letter opening lines and outreach hooks from resume and audit. Generate lines.
features.when: When user asks about cover letter or outreach.

features.name: Templates
features.description: Cover letters, thank-you emails, follow-ups, LinkedIn outreach, resume tailoring, interview prep. Meridian drafts; you edit and send. Link from Explore or Quick links.
features.when: When user asks for a template, cover letter, thank-you, follow-up, or LinkedIn message.

features.name: Career Hub
features.description: Searchable career history. Timeline of applications, audits, people, companies, deadlines, decisions, learnings. Search: 'What did I say about McKinsey?' Add decision log: why I turned down X, what I learned. Link from Explore or Quick links.
features.when: When user asks to search their career history, find notes on a company, see their timeline, or log a decision or learning.

features.name: Calendar
features.description: Add and manage deadlines (application dates, interviews, events). Sub-deadlines per main deadline. Shown in Career Center when upcoming.
features.when: When user asks where to add a deadline or see upcoming dates.

features.name: Firm deadlines lookup
features.description: Ask Dilly 'when is the Goldman Sachs internship deadline?' or 'what are Google's application deadlines?' and get typical cycle dates plus any deadlines you've already saved to your calendar. Dates are estimates — always verify on the company's careers page.
features.when: When user asks about a company's application deadline or recruiting timeline.

features.name: Personalized playbook page
features.description: Full-screen /career-playbook: deep LLM brief tailored to their cohort playbook, audit, and resume text. Entry from Get Hired 'View full playbook'. Optional Talk to Dilly handoff.
features.when: When user asks about their full playbook, personalized hiring strategy for their track, or the career-playbook page.

features.name: Job search checklist
features.description: Phased checklist (story, pipeline, interviews). Each row has the user's Dilly AI avatar at the end of the step title — opens Voice with that step's context so Dilly can coach, draft lines, or troubleshoot.
features.when: When user asks about the job search checklist on Get Hired or help with a specific checklist step.

features.name: Dilly
features.description: Chat with Meridian. Ask about resume, scores, stickers, how to do something, or run gap scan, ready check, bullet rewrite, interview prep, jobs. Multiple conversation tabs.
features.when: When user asks to talk to Meridian or do something via chat.

features.name: Dilly inline visuals (expanded)
features.description: Chat can show small cards: application tracker row ([[application_card]]), your next three moves ([[next_moves]]), story arc for interviews ([[story_timeline]]), vs peers Top % ([[peer_context_visual]]), plus existing score radar, deadlines, interview strip, calendar saved, before/after, chips, steps. Career Center may show a short 'Last chat with Dilly' recap after you leave Voice.
features.when: When describing what Dilly can render in chat or post-session recap on the home tab.

features.name: Emotional support
features.description: Meridian helps with mindset and feelings, not just tasks. Rejection: reframe and next steps. Imposter syndrome: cite their achievements. Celebration: celebrate, offer negotiate tips. Anxiety: simple prep plan. Transitions: short transition plan. Warm but professional.
features.when: When user shares rejection, nerves, celebration, self-doubt, or career transition.

features.name: Settings
features.description: Profile themes, Voice tone, Custom tagline, Remember this notes, Sound effects, Invite a friend, Achievements link. Accessed from gear icon.
features.when: When user asks to change theme, voice tone, or referral link.

features.name: Share card / Badge / Snapshot
features.description: After audit: download Badge, Share to LinkedIn, Snapshot, Copy summary, PDF, share link. Uses custom tagline and up to 3 achievement stickers.
features.when: When user asks about sharing their result or downloading a badge.

aliases.keyword: ATS Readiness or ATS keyword check
